title: Easy money arriving in three forms
subtitle: A visualisation for practising the receipt of income that arrives without a fight.
excerpt: A ten-minute visualisation for releasing the hard-earning belief. The image shows money arriving through three different routes by a specific day. Use when you want to practise receiving ease, rather than expecting struggle.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education, developed for the easy-earning theme of Day 10 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Draws on forward-projection visualisation techniques from the public-domain coaching tradition.

content.text: A ten-minute visualisation for practising ease around incoming money. The image is specific: three routes by a specific day. This is not a guarantee. It is a rehearsal for receiving.
Sit comfortably. Close your eyes. Three slow breaths to arrive.
Picture the next seven days laid out in front of you. Not the tasks, not the obligations. Just the days, open.

Within those seven days, see money arriving through three separate routes. They don't need to be large. They don't need to be specific amounts. What matters is that they arrive easily, without fight, without sacrifice, without the particular heaviness that the hard-earning belief expects.

See yourself receiving the first route. Notice if the old reflex shows up (the waiting for it to go wrong, the suspicion about it). If it does, stay with the image a moment longer. The reflex is the pattern. The image is the rehearsal for something different.
Now the second route. Then the third. Each one light. Each one real. Each one staying.
Hold the image of money in three forms, in seven days, with no struggle attached to any of them.
When you're ready, open your eyes. If you want, write down the three routes you saw.
